payload.answer: The new fact supersedes the existing current employment fact. Sam should no longer be stored as currently working at Goldman; instead, store Sam as currently at Point72 and Goldman as a former employer.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same person, Sam, and introduces a time-based employment transition rather than a different entity.

details: Detected a direct temporal employment transition.
Classified the old current fact as superseded by newer information.
Prepared one current memory card and one historical memory card.

repair_options: Mark 'Sam works at Goldman' as no longer current.
Add 'Sam works at Point72' as the current employment fact.
Retain Goldman only as historical employment, not as current.
